# Site copy master document
# Jeremy Finch - Commercial Strategist Site
# Last exported: May 2026
#
# How to use this file
# - Edit copy in Google Docs or any editor. Keep each LOCATION ID unchanged.
# - When done, paste back into Cursor: "Apply all copy from COPY.md to index.html"
# - Do not edit HTML comments or placeholder blocks unless you are replacing them with final copy.
#
# Punctuation rule for this site: use spaced hyphen ( - ), never em dash or en dash.

## Section 1 - Hero

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|

| `hero.headline.primary` | Headline (black, uppercase on site) | You're the expert in the technology. |
| `hero.headline.accent` | Headline (grey, uppercase on site) | I'll help craft the story. |
| `hero.lede` | Body | Early-stage product marketing and commercial strategy for technical founders building new, hard-to-explain, high-value things. |
| `hero.cta` | Button | Let's chat about what you're building → |
| `hero.logos.label` | Eyebrow | Previously |

---

## Section 2 - Point of view

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `pov.eyebrow` | Eyebrow | Point of view |
| `pov.headline` | Headline (uppercase on site) | If you wait until it's ready, you're already too late. |
| `pov.body` | Body | In long, capital-intensive development projects, every cycle and conversation counts. The market story has to grow alongside your core tech - not just get bolted on at the very end. |
| `pov.caveat` | Body | Marketing can't fix underlying technology, your org design, or any legal / IP problems. But a GTM voice belongs in the room early - especially as your product is still being built. |

### POV cards

| LOCATION | Card title | Card body |
|----------|------------|-----------|
| `pov.card.01.title` | Finding partners | A partner narrative opens early doors that cold outreach never will. |
| `pov.card.02.title` | Attracting talent | Mission and story are part of recruiting and compensation strategy. |
| `pov.card.03.title` | Extending the runway | A clear, distinct investor narrative helps you raise faster, on better terms. |
| `pov.card.04.title` | Understanding the market | Customer and competitor research shapes what you build, not just how to sell. |
| `pov.card.05.title` | Crafting a narrative | Adjacent industries, regulators, acquirers - each needs a version of the story. |
| `pov.card.06.title` | Building early social proof | Case studies can take years to build. Start as early as possible. |

## Section 4 - About

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `about.eyebrow` | Eyebrow | About |
| `about.visible` | Body (always shown) | My work involves cross-functional translation - across hardware and software, public companies and startups, as an employee and as an adviser - between the people who build the technology and the audiences who need to fund, partner with, or bet on it. |
| `about.toggle.collapsed` | Button | + Background |
| `about.toggle.expanded` | Button | − Less |
| `about.expanded.01` | Body (hidden until expanded) | I have an MBA from MIT Sloan. I've worked at Adobe, HubSpot, and Altitude (an industrial design firm, acquired by Accenture). Much of my career has been spent in environments where the product is complex, development cycles are long, and nothing is particularly intuitive or self-evident to anyone outside the team. |
| `about.expanded.02` | Body (hidden until expanded) | Open to FT roles or selective advisory work where commercial strategy is part of the build. |
| `about.expanded.link` | Link label | jeremyafinch.com |
| `about.photo.alt` | Image alt text | Jeremy Finch |

## Modal - TeraDAR

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `modal.teradar.title` | Title | TeraDAR |
| `modal.teradar.situation.label` | Label | Situation |
| `modal.teradar.situation.body` | Body | Pre-seed advisory engagement with a novel deep tech company that needed to translate complex sensor technology into a story investors could fund. Scope included investor narrative development, pitch deck design, and ongoing technical product marketing. |
| `modal.teradar.outcome.label` | Label | Outcome |
| `modal.teradar.outcome.body` | Body | Multiple rounds raised at increasing valuations. Exited stealth publicly in 2025. Engagement spanned seed through Series B. |
| `modal.teradar.placeholder.testimonial` | Worked directly with Teradar's CEO and head of Product. |
| `modal.teradar.placeholder.image` | Placeholder (not visible as final copy) | IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: TeraDAR product photo - replace with <img> |

---

## Modal - Lux Labs

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `modal.lux.title` | Title | Lux Labs Displays |
| `modal.lux.situation.label` | Label | Situation |
| `modal.lux.situation.body` | Body | Consulting project with MIT-spinout transparent projection film company. They had high web traffic but weak conversion and low sales. A 30-SKU product line was too complex. Messaging led with technical specs instead of user language and B2B outcomes. |
| `modal.lux.outcome.label` | Label | Outcome |
| `modal.lux.outcome.body` | Body | Product line simplified to two offerings. 100% ROI within 6 weeks through sales uplift and improved margins. Website and pricing structure held through acquisition. |
| `modal.lux.placeholder.testimonial` | “Lux Labs hired Jeremy to support our ClearBright product launch. He helped us overhaul our e-commerce approach by redesigning our website, simplifying our pricing and packaging, and creating new marketing content. He helped us step back and evaluate how to communicate with our customers.”  Spencer Powers (CEO, Lux Labs)|
| `modal.lux.placeholder.image` | Placeholder | IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Lux Labs product photo - replace with <img> |

---

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `modal.preipo.title` | Title | Pre-IPO Roadshow |
| `modal.preipo.situation.label` | Label | Situation |
| `modal.preipo.situation.body` | Body | Consulting project for a privately held company that needed a video series to anchor a pre-IPO institutional investor roadshow - high stakes, compressed timeline. |
| `modal.preipo.outcome.label` | Label | Outcome |
| `modal.preipo.outcome.body` | Body | Company ultimately pivoted from IPO to private equity due to market conditions. But the fundraise succeeded. And the narrative held through the pivot. |
| `modal.preipo.note` | Note | Company name withheld at client request. |

## Modal - Akeneo

| LOCATION | Type | Copy |
|----------|------|------|
| `modal.akeneo.title` | Title | Akeneo |
| `modal.akeneo.situation.label` | Label | Situation |
| `modal.akeneo.situation.body` | Body | Contract product marketing role at Akeneo. The team needed a scalable way to qualify enterprise prospects, retain existing accounts, and communicate value across a complex B2B buying process. |
| `modal.akeneo.outcome.label` | Label | Outcome |
| `modal.akeneo.outcome.body` | Body | Built a key GTM tool that has run for 6+ years, generated tens of thousands of data points, and automated lead routing. Translated into four languages. Still in use. |
| `modal.akeneo.placeholder.testimonial` | “Jeremy delivered an integrated online assessment tool for us that is a key part of our overall GTM strategy. He identified the deliverables and risks, created a roadmap to meet our aggressive timeline, and kept us on track with detailed multimedia updates. We couldn't be happier with the partnership.”

Kristin Naragon (Chief Strategy Officer, Akeneo) |
